description: Backend data contract for Announcements page – manage school announcements with categories, audience, status, views, and pinning.

getStats.description: Get summary statistics for the top cards (total announcements, published count, pinned count, total views).

getAnnouncements.description: Fetch list of announcements with filtering, sorting (pinned first), and search.

queryParams.category: string (optional, values: All, General, Academic, Event, Holiday, Urgent)
queryParams.status: string (optional, values: All, Published, Draft, Scheduled)

announcements.title: string
announcements.category: enum: General, Academic, Event, Holiday, Urgent
announcements.audience: enum: All Students, All Parents, All Teachers, Specific Class

announcements.title: Annual Sports Day – 10th June 2026
announcements.body: The Annual Sports Day will be held on 10th June 2026 at the school ground...

createAnnouncement.description: Create a new announcement (Draft or Published).

requestBody.title: string (required)
requestBody.category: enum: General, Academic, Event, Holiday, Urgent (default General)
requestBody.audience: enum: All Students, All Parents, All Teachers, Specific Class (default All Students)

response.data: Announcement object (with generated id, views=0, publishedAt set if status=Published, else null)

updateAnnouncement.description: Update an existing announcement. Partial updates allowed (PATCH semantics).

incrementViews.description: Increment view count for an announcement (called when announcement is viewed).

getFilterOptions.description: Available categories and statuses for filter dropdowns.

exportAnnouncements.description: Export filtered announcements as CSV (same query params as getAnnouncements, no pagination).
exportAnnouncements.response: CSV file download with columns: id, title, body, category, audience, status, pinned, views, publishedAt

fieldNotes.publishedAt: Only set when status = Published. For Scheduled announcements, may store the scheduled publish date (not implemented in UI yet).
fieldNotes.pinned: Pinned announcements appear first in list. UI sorts by pinned descending.
fieldNotes.views: Incremented when an announcement is viewed (e.g., on detail page or card click).
fieldNotes.body: Rich text or plain text – UI uses plain text in mock, but backend can support HTML/markdown.
